## 🌟 Overview

**VAMPIRE MUSIC BOT** ek powerful Telegram music bot hai jo voice chats me audio/video stream karta hai — fast, stable aur 24/7 running support ke saath.

---

## ✨ Features

- 🎧 Audio + Video Streaming  
- ⚡ Fast Performance  
- 🔄 Stable Playback  
- 🛡️ Secure System  
- 🚀 24/7 Support (tmux/VPS)

---

## 🚀 VPS Deployment (Step by Step)

### Step 1 — Clone Repo

```bash
git clone https://github.com/VAMPIRE-BOTS/VAMPIRE-VBIT
cd VAMPIRE-VBIT
